title: What Cloud Is
shortSummary: A plain-English orientation to what cloud actually means and why it became the default operating model for modern digital systems.
whyItMatters: Cloud affects almost every modern business whether the team is technical or not. It shapes speed, cost, resilience, data access, software delivery, and how companies scale without buying and maintaining all of their own infrastructure.
coreConcepts: Cloud as rented capability instead of owned hardware
Compute, storage, databases, analytics, and software as services
Why teams move from on-premise infrastructure to cloud platforms
How non-technical teams still make cloud-shaped decisions

goDeeper.label: See how cloud connects to software engineering
goDeeper.description: Branch into the subject that turns cloud choices into delivery systems.
